channel.title: Books by Luki Belle | Dark Fantasy & Paranormal Fiction on Luki Belle – Fiction Author
channel.description: Recent content in Books by Luki Belle | Dark Fantasy & Paranormal Fiction on Luki Belle – Fiction Author

item.title: The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste
item.description:
The Delicate Affair of Colonel Baquiste

Power, empire, and the cost of control.

A wounded colonel on a secret mission confronts prejudice, intrigue, and a dangerous adversary in a world where victory may demand more than strategy.

In a world shaped by conquest and hierarchy, where power defines truth and prejudice distorts perception, one man is forced beyond the battlefield—into a realm where control is no longer absolute.

item.title: Shakti of the Illuminated Lotus
item.description:
Shakti of the Illuminated Lotus

Desire, identity, and the pull of the unseen.

In a world where divine forces walk unseen among mortals, ancient exile has not ended power—it has only changed its form.

Power does not vanish when exiled—it transforms, waits, and rises again.

Across continents, hidden rulers, sacred beings, and forgotten lineages move in silence, shaping a future built on a past that was never resolved. At the center of it all— a woman who does not yet know what she carries.

item.title: The Vicious & The Virile VII
item.description:
The Vicious & The Virile VII

When instinct awakens, humanity is no longer the dominant force.

A world where civilization is fragile—and instinct is eternal.

Where the structures meant to contain violence begin to fracture, and what lies beneath emerges without restraint.

Instinct, survival, and the collapse of control.

From bloodlines marked by primal inheritance to landscapes where nature reclaims dominance, each story reveals a chilling truth:

Power does not always evolve—it sometimes reverts.

item.title: Test Book
item.description:
Test Book

If you can see this, routing works.

item.title: The Sexy Seven Supernaturals
item.description:
The Sexy Seven Supernaturals

Desire, identity, and the pull of the unseen.

A world where desire is not just emotion—but force.

Where identity is shaped by encounters beyond the visible, and where the supernatural is not separate from human experience—but deeply intertwined with it.

In a world where desire shapes destiny and unseen forces influence human choices, identities are tested, boundaries dissolve, and transformation becomes inevitable.
